1.gl: to go (causatively, bring) out, in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively, direct and proxim.

1.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also (typically) of his posterity
1.dv: from H8280 (שָׂרָה) and H410 (אֵל); he will rule as God;

1.gl: Mitsrajim, i.e. Upper and Lower Egypt

2.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)

2.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
2.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

2.gl: Jehudah (or Judah), the name of five Israelites; also of the tribe descended from the first, and of its territory
Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also (typically) of his posterity
2.dv: from H8280 (שָׂרָה) and H410 (אֵל); he will rule as God;

2.gl: rule; also (concretely in plural) a realm or a ruler

3.gl: to revolve, surround, or border; used in various applications, literally and figuratively

3.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
3.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

3.gl: the hinder part; hence (adverb) behind, backward; also (as facing north) the West
3.kj: after(-ward), back (part, -side, -ward), hereafter, (be-) hind(-er part), time to come, without.

3.gl: to flit, i.e. vanish away (subside, escape; causatively, chase, impel, deliver)
3.kj: [idiom] abate, away, be displayed, (make to) flee (away, -ing), put to flight, [idiom] hide, lift up a standard.

3.gl: Jarden, the principal river of Palestine

4.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
4.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

4.gl: properly, strength; hence, anything strong; specifically a chief (politically); also a ram (from his strength); a pilaster (as a strong support); an oak or other strong tree
4.kj: mighty (man), lintel, oak, post, ram, tree.

4.gl: a collective name for a flock (of sheep or goats); also figuratively (of men)
4.dv: or צאוֹן; (Psalm 144:13), from an unused root meaning to migrate;

4.gl: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)
properly, to stamp, i.e. to spring about (wildly or for joy)

4.dv: feminine from the same as H1387 (גֶּבַע);

5.kj: how (long, oft, (-soever)), (no-) thing, what (end, good, purpose, thing), whereby(-fore, -in, -to, -with), (for) why.
5.dv: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle;

5.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south

5.gl: the hinder part; hence (adverb) behind, backward; also (as facing north) the West
5.kj: after(-ward), back (part, -side, -ward), hereafter, (be-) hind(-er part), time to come, without.

6.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

6.kj: mighty (man), lintel, oak, post, ram, tree.

6.gl: a collective name for a flock (of sheep or goats); also figuratively (of men)
6.dv: or צאוֹן; (Psalm 144:13), from an unused root meaning to migrate;

6.gl: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)
properly, to stamp, i.e. to spring about (wildly or for joy)

6.dv: feminine from the same as H1387 (גֶּבַע);

7.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
7.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
7.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

7.gl: properly, to twist or whirl (in a circular or spiral manner), i.e. (specifically) to dance, to writhe in pain (especially of parturition) or fear; figuratively, to wait, to pervert
7.kj: bear, (make to) bring forth, (make to) calve, dance, drive away, fall grievously (with pain), fear, form, great, grieve, (be) grievous, hope, look, make, be in pain, be much (sore)

7.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
7.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
7.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

7.kj: lord, master, owner. Compare also names beginning with 'Adoni-'.
7.dv: or (shortened) אָדֹן; from an unused root (meaning to rule);
rarely (shortened) אֱלֹהַּ; probably prolonged (emphatic) from H410 (אֵל);

8.gl: properly, a cliff (or sharp rock, as compressed); generally, a rock or boulder; figuratively, a refuge; also an edge (as precipitous)
8.kj: edge, [idiom] (mighty) God (one), rock, [idiom] sharp, stone, [idiom] strength, [idiom] strong. See also H1049 (בֵּית צוּר).

8.gl: to turn about or over; by implication, to change, overturn, return, pervert
8.kj: [idiom] become, change, come, be converted, give, make (a bed), overthrow (-turn), perverse, retire, tumble, turn (again, aside, back, to the contrary, every way).

8.gl: a fountain (also collectively), figuratively, a source (of satisfaction)
8.dv: or מַעְיְנוֹ; (Psalm 114:8), or (feminine) מַעְיָנָה; from H5869 (עַיִן) (as a denominative in the sense of a spring);

8.gl: water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen
8.dv: dual of a primitive noun (but used in a singular sense);

8.gl: a marsh; hence a rush (as growing in swamps); hence a stockade of reeds
8.dv: from an unused root (meaning to collect as water);
probably from H2492 (חָלַם) (in the sense of hardness);
